title: PPP-TTT Ledger Entry (PHI-free, hash-chained, parallel to the main audit ledger)
description: One append-only record in the PPP-TTT parallel audit trail (verification/ppp-ttt/ledger.js). PHI-FREE BY CONSTRUCTION: discriminator IDs, tier codes, caveat codes, safety-net IDs, and a patient-decision enum — never free-text patient narrative (additionalProperties:false makes an extra field unrepresentable). Cross-links to the main medicolegal ledger by { run_id, candidate_output_hash, trunk_id }. entry_hash = sha256(canonical(entry-without-entry_hash) + prev_hash), same chain algorithm as audit-ledger-entry. Zod mirror: verification/ppp-ttt/ledger-schema.js (this JSON schema is the source of truth).

run_id.description: Join key to the main audit ledger.

candidate_output_hash.description: Cross-link anchor: the exact verified output bytes the frozen verifier already hashed.

mode.description: Normalised via verification/mode.js — mock is never presented as live.
